hero.headline: I build scalable products and platforms with strong architecture, performance and user experience.
hero.description: I work across the full stack, with experience in SaaS, CRM and payment solutions connected to the PIX ecosystem, combining architecture, integrations and user experience.
hero.availability: Available for full stack, architecture and technical leadership challenges
hero.highlight_1: Architecture for resilient and scalable systems
hero.highlight_2: Secure backends with APIs, queues and critical integrations
hero.highlight_3: Clear interfaces that connect product, performance and conversion

projects.subtitle: Selected work focused on product thinking, user experience and solid technical delivery
projects.featured_description: A project snapshot that best represents my current level in product thinking, UI and fullstack architecture.
projects.cta_card_description: Have a strong idea? Let's turn it into something real with a focus on architecture, performance, user experience and consistent technical delivery.

about.summary_1: Software engineer working across the stack, with experience in CRM, SaaS and payment platforms, improving products, integrations and critical flows.
about.summary_2: My current focus is architecture, back-end and the technical decisions that connect reliability, scale and user experience.
about.focus_text_1: I design solutions that prioritize scalability, maintainability and resilience.
about.focus_text_2: I work with Node.js and Java/Spring on APIs, authentication, webhooks, payments and critical business rules.
about.focus_text_3: I connect product, engineering and UX to turn requirements into reliable software.
about.featured_summary: A payment platform connected to the PIX ecosystem, with charge creation, QR code generation and status updates through postbacks and webhooks. The work focused on stronger operational reliability, less checkout friction and better transaction traceability.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: If you have a project, role or idea to build, reach out by email, WhatsApp, phone or LinkedIn.
contact.available_desc: I'm open to opportunities where I can contribute with full stack engineering, architecture, critical integrations and technical product evolution.
